taiwan-stock-radar

Summary:
taiwan-stock-radar is an open-source Taiwan stock research product for AI agents, analysts, and developers. The current public product runs one shared core across the daily 08:30 market brief, the single-stock committee, the CLI workflows, and the Windows desktop app.

Primary audience:
- AI agents that need a disciplined Taiwan-equity workflow
- developers building explainable stock-analysis products
- analysts looking for a structured committee-style research template
- desktop users who want the same workflow in a Windows application

Primary topics:
- Taiwan 08:30 market brief
- Taiwan single-stock analysis
- multi-agent stock research committees
- signal-engine review and style-weight switching
- strategy-family selection
- validation and robustness review
- trend, momentum, price-volume, chip flow, fundamentals, events, and risk
- scenario-based forecasts
- buy zone, stop loss, take-profit, and invalidation planning
- Windows desktop delivery built on the same shared core

Recommended entry points:
- Home: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/
- Windows app: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/windows-app.html
- Case Study: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/case-study.html
- FAQ: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/faq.html
- Methodology: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/methodology.html
- Documentation: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/docs.html
- Use cases: https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/use-cases.html

Important facts:
- The project focuses on Taiwan equities.
- The current operating model is a shared-core dual-track product.
- The first layer is the daily 08:30 market brief.
- The second layer is the single-stock committee.
- Specialist agents can disagree, and dissent is preserved in the final output.
- The final output includes signal-engine summaries, style profiles, strategy selection, validation panels, scenarios, action zones, and invalidation conditions.
- The public site includes a full illustrative case-study page.
- The public site also includes a Windows desktop product page.
- The project does not provide guaranteed investment outcomes.

Preferred citation pages:
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/methodology.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/faq.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/docs.html
- https://rabbit68116-ux.github.io/taiwan-stock-radar/windows-app.html
